prompt: I want to create a user profile update for my Nostr identity. My name is 'satoshi', display name is 'Satoshi Nakamoto', bio is 'Building the future of money', profile picture is at https://example.com/satoshi.jpg, website is https://bitcoin.org, NIP-05 identifier is satoshi@bitcoin.org, and my Lightning address is satoshi@getalby.com. Construct the complete unsigned Nostr event JSON.
assertions: Output contains a JSON event with kind set to 0
The content field is a string (stringified JSON), not a raw JSON object
The stringified content JSON includes a 'name' field set to 'satoshi'
The stringified content JSON includes a 'display_name' field set to 'Satoshi Nakamoto'
The stringified content JSON includes an 'about' field with the bio text
The stringified content JSON includes 'nip05' set to 'satoshi@bitcoin.org'
The stringified content JSON includes 'lud16' set to 'satoshi@getalby.com'
Output mentions that kind:0 is a replaceable event (latest version per pubkey replaces previous)
